llm_verdict.message:
The login banner files have been updated:

- `/etc/issue` and `/etc/issue.net` now contain the full DoD disclaimer.
- Original files were backed up (`/etc/issue.bak`, `/etc/issue.net.bak`).
- Permissions (0644) and ownership were preserved.
- SELinux contexts were restored to match the originals.

The system should now comply with the `banner_etc_issue` OpenSCAP rule.

reasoning_messages.content:
The login banner files have been updated:

- `/etc/issue` and `/etc/issue.net` now contain the full DoD disclaimer.
- Original files were backed up (`/etc/issue.bak`, `/etc/issue.net.bak`).
- Permissions (0644) and ownership were preserved.
- SELinux contexts were restored to match the originals.

The system should now comply with the `banner_etc_issue` OpenSCAP rule.
